name: Soccer/football rpg
description:
Well I couldn’t find a good soccer/football simulator bot so I made it myself 😼

This is a remastered version of my soccer/football rpg bot on c. Ai I made a good while back. Unfortunately the bot will assume your action because it’s an rpg bot, but try to give a good reply not a lazy one, for example: “I am a English player that is a right winger and is currently playing for Liverpool.”

(This is my second bot so leave suggestions and give me ideas for new bots too!
creator: MILKYMAN
